final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: sports photography, editorial photo
Primary request: freeze-frame of an NBA player executing a powerful slam dunk at the rim height
Scene/backdrop: professional NBA basketball court with blurred audience stands, sea of colorful glow sticks and phone flashlights creating dreamy bokeh
Subject: male basketball player mid-air at rim level, right arm extended high holding basketball, wrist cocked down about to slam, explosive and focused facial expression, sweat droplets frozen in air under lights
Style/medium: sports photography, Getty Images editorial aesthetic, 1/2000s shutter freeze
Composition/framing: telephoto lens compression, dynamic action framing, player as focal point
Lighting/mood: dramatic overhead arena lighting creating strong chiaroscuro contrast on player, high-contrast theatrical atmosphere
Color palette: warm court wood tones, cool arena shadows, colorful bokeh from audience lights, skin tones with dramatic highlights
Materials/textures: realistic sweat droplets suspended in air, athletic jersey fabric, basketball leather texture, glossy court floor
Constraints: preserve the frozen motion of dunk, keep opponent player below attempting block with tense body language, maintain Getty Images sports photography style
Avoid: plastic skin, motion blur on main subject, deformed hands, watermark, over-saturated colors
